name: Obsidian-like knowledge graph
objective: Interactive Obsidian-like knowledge map of the KB — documents as nodes, links/tags as edges — rendered client-side on the static GitHub Pages site.

review.note: operator visual QA via Claude Design returned 5 renderer revisions (GRAPH_BRIEF.md P6.S1 revision block): quiet labels A-prime, idle mingle, pointer zoom+pan, sticky node re-placement, legend highlight-not-filter
